---
title: "Resources"
pagetitle: "Resources"
aliases: 
  - for-clinicians.html
  - for-scientists.html
  
listing:
  - id: resources-all
    contents: "Resources/*/*.{qmd,md}"
    type: custom
    template: ejs/resource-cards.ejs
    categories: false
    fields:
      - title
      - short-description
      - resource-link
      - categories
    sort-ui: FALSE
    filter-ui: FALSE
    #sort: "date desc"
editor: source
---

Explore our curated database of resources designed to help scientists and clinicians embrace open science practices in Communication Sciences and Disorders.

<!--# ::: {.callout-tip appearance="minimal"}
See a resource missing? Let us know!
::: -->
---
::: {#resources-all}
:::
